description: Mythar Living Lexicon — gap-fill clusters 12–94 with atomic roots, compounds, Proto-World universals (proposals K–L), and domain tags.

proposals.G: Blessing / birth triad (tiki / yocfua / manalara — cluster 48)

roots.meaning: mother / existence / breath-base (formally anchored kinship root)
child / small / sacred diminutive (size; cf. chi=child)
sibling / near / kin; also no / not (negation sense)
mouth / speech aperture; also person / human-breath
spirit-name variant of ni; also small / grain
wisdom-see / inner sight; also life / living
power / vital craft (ka/kra lighter); also high-grow
move variant of bu; also animal / creature
proclaim / intensify / ground; also great / big (scale)
small sacred power / pure vital spark (ti+ki)
bad / heavy / burden; also two / dual
truth / real (cognitive register; cf. fi sacred-verity)

clusters.name: Father-child-kin
clusters.interpretation: Father–child–kin triad; rest in the divine

morphemes.gloss: child / small / sacred diminutive (size; cf. chi=child)
sibling / near / kin; also no / not (negation sense)

clusters.name: Breath-eye-hand
clusters.interpretation: Breath–sight–hand: vital perception and action at rest

clusters.name: Move-flow-carry
clusters.interpretation: Come–flow–carry toward the divine

clusters.name: Know good spirit
clusters.interpretation: Know the good-named spirit; rest in the divine

clusters.name: Water-tree-earth
clusters.interpretation: Water–tree–earth: living world under vital light

clusters.name: Father-mother-child
clusters.interpretation: Core family triad settled in the divine

morphemes.gloss: mother / existence / breath-base (formally anchored kinship root)
child / small / sacred diminutive (size; cf. chi=child)

clusters.name: Kin-see-father
clusters.interpretation: Kin sees the father: ancestral line of sight

morphemes.gloss: sibling / near / kin; also no / not (negation sense)

clusters.name: Sibling-child-kin
clusters.interpretation: Extended family: sibling–child–kin bond

morphemes.gloss: child / small / sacred diminutive (size; cf. chi=child)
sibling / near / kin; also no / not (negation sense)

clusters.name: Divine-kin-mother
clusters.interpretation: Sacred ancestry through mother-kin

morphemes.gloss: sibling / near / kin; also no / not (negation sense)
mother / existence / breath-base (formally anchored kinship root)

clusters.name: You-father-rest
clusters.interpretation: Address to father in peace

clusters.name: Mother-sibling-divine
clusters.interpretation: Maternal blessing over siblings

morphemes.gloss: mother / existence / breath-base (formally anchored kinship root)

clusters.name: Mouth-breath-eye
clusters.interpretation: Mouth–breath–eye: speech, breath, sight

morphemes.gloss: mouth / speech aperture; also person / human-breath

clusters.name: Tongue-hand-head
clusters.interpretation: Tongue–hand–head: speech, craft, mind

clusters.name: Foot-high-breath
clusters.interpretation: Foot lifted; high breath — upright life

clusters.name: Heart-vital-eye
clusters.interpretation: Heart’s vital eye: felt seeing

clusters.name: Water-mouth-rest
clusters.interpretation: Water at the mouth; speech at rest

morphemes.gloss: mouth / speech aperture; also person / human-breath

clusters.name: Earth-tongue-carry
clusters.interpretation: Earth-tongue carries: grounded speech

clusters.name: Come-carry-flow
clusters.interpretation: Journey: come, carry, flow

clusters.name: Flow-come-hand
clusters.interpretation: Flow comes to the hand

clusters.name: Know-come-divine
clusters.interpretation: Knowledge comes to the divine

clusters.name: Flow-carry-vital
clusters.interpretation: Vital flow of carrying

clusters.name: Good-come-rest
clusters.interpretation: The good comes to rest

clusters.name: High-carry-earth
clusters.interpretation: Carry high upon the earth

clusters.name: Know-name-good
clusters.interpretation: Know the good name

clusters.name: See-know-rest
clusters.interpretation: See and know at rest

clusters.name: Name-divine-vital
clusters.interpretation: Divine vital name

clusters.name: Good-name-existence
clusters.interpretation: Good name of existence / mother-being

morphemes.gloss: mother / existence / breath-base (formally anchored kinship root)

clusters.name: See-name-divine
clusters.interpretation: See the divine name

clusters.name: Know-good-name-divine
clusters.interpretation: Know the good divine name (four-morpheme seal)

clusters.name: Water-tree-earth
clusters.interpretation: Reinforced living triad: water–tree–earth

clusters.name: Light-water-flow
clusters.interpretation: Light upon flowing water

clusters.name: Earth-high-light
clusters.interpretation: Earth rises into high light

clusters.name: Water-earth-breath
clusters.interpretation: Water and earth breathe

clusters.name: High-water-carry
clusters.interpretation: High waters carry

clusters.name: Light-earth-rest
clusters.interpretation: Light rests upon the earth

clusters.name: Lmakra-yuckara
clusters.interpretation: Call-and-response around kra: light-existence vital-heart — divine-knowing vital-craft (heart-activation / soul-alignment)
clusters.poetic: Light-existence vital-heart — divine-knowing vital-craft

metadata.egyptian_ka_kra_note: Non-doctrinal resonance note: kra ~ Egyptian ka (vital essence) — comparative metaphor only, not constitutional evidence of descent

clusters.name: Tiki-yocfua-manalara
clusters.interpretation: Three-part blessing / birth-awakening / soul emergence: pure sacred spark, divine blessed flow, proclaimed mother-light of the named spirit
clusters.poetic: Pure sacred spark, divine blessed flow, proclaimed mother-light of the named spirit.

morphemes.gloss: small sacred power / pure vital spark / child of heart-force
divine blessing flow / graceful fortune / blessed becoming
proclaimed mother-light-name / illuminated existence of named spirit

metadata.complements: Complements kra clusters (47) with child + blessing dimensions
metadata.provenance_note: Links child/sacred ti (clusters 12, 17, 19) and kra-axis compounds (cluster 47)

clusters.name: Makra-yufala
clusters.interpretation: Mother-heart in divine blessing-light (heart-axis blessing invocation)
clusters.poetic: Mother-heart in divine blessing-light.

clusters.name: Tina-rofua
clusters.interpretation: The child-name rests in blessed flow (identity stabilization / soul-naming)
clusters.poetic: The child-name rests in blessed flow.

metadata.provenance_note: Links child ti (48) with name na and rest ro

clusters.name: Yakora-lamina
clusters.interpretation: Divine heart-craft illuminates the small name (name-axis illumination)
clusters.poetic: Divine heart-craft illuminates the small name.

metadata.provenance_note: Pairs divine craft (yakora) with illuminated naming (lamina)

clusters.name: Sufala-yotira
clusters.interpretation: Good blessing-light proclaims the divine child-force (soul-awakening / proclamation)
clusters.poetic: Good blessing-light proclaims the divine child-force.

clusters.name: Krafu-yumana
clusters.interpretation: Blessed vital force names divine existence (heart-naming / soul-naming)
clusters.poetic: Blessed vital force names divine existence.

clusters.name: Lamara-yufina
clusters.interpretation: Light-existence proclaims the divine blessed true name (truth-axis naming)
clusters.poetic: Light-existence proclaims the divine blessed true name.

clusters.name: Toraka-mafira
clusters.interpretation: The gate-power proclaims mother-truth (threshold / initiation cluster)
clusters.poetic: The gate-power proclaims mother-truth.

metadata.provenance_note: Gate tor + power aka at mother-truth threshold

clusters.name: Yukra-tifala
clusters.interpretation: The knowing-heart blesses the child-light (heart-child alignment)
clusters.poetic: The knowing-heart blesses the child-light.

metadata.provenance_note: Aligns yu+kra heart-knowing with child blessing-light

clusters.name: Ramina-yokra
clusters.interpretation: The proclaimed small-name meets the divine heart-force (identity-heart convergence)
clusters.poetic: The proclaimed small-name meets the divine heart-force.

metadata.provenance_note: Named spirit (ramina) converges with divine kra

clusters.name: Fukara-lamayu
clusters.interpretation: Blessing-heart-craft in light-existence-divine (blessing-axis expansion)
clusters.poetic: Blessing-heart-craft in light-existence-divine.

metadata.provenance_note: Expands fu+kra craft into la+ma+yu divine field

clusters.name: Tifura-yokala
clusters.interpretation: The child-blessing is proclaimed in divine force-light (child-axis proclamation)
clusters.poetic: The child-blessing is proclaimed in divine force-light.

metadata.provenance_note: Child blessing proclaimed in yo+ka+la force-light

clusters.name: Makora-yufina-ro
clusters.interpretation: The mother-heart proclaims the divine blessed true name in peace (completion / sealing formula)
clusters.poetic: The mother-heart proclaims the divine blessed true name in peace.

morphemes.gloss: motion blessing-truth-name / divine blessed true name

metadata.sealing_note: Terminal ro closes the naming arc; ya omitted by design
metadata.provenance_note: Culminates clusters 49–59 naming and blessing axis

clusters.name: Ebro-la-kajya-lapio-mufay
clusters.interpretation: Emergent bearer of light, divine-affirmed power, seed-light place, mother-breath blessing (full emergence invocation line)
clusters.poetic: The one who emerges bearing light, whose power is affirmed by the divine, whose light-seed rests in place, blessed by the mother's breath.

morphemes.gloss: power affirmed in divine grace / divine-affirmed force
mother-breath blessing in grace / graceful giving from mother-root

metadata.provenance_note: Five-syllable ritual line; parallels kra clusters 47–48 breadth

clusters.name: Plafo-micala-haftar
clusters.interpretation: Open plain gathers the spark-light essence, proclaimed in protective embrace (grounding invocation)
clusters.poetic: In the wide plain, the small light-being is proclaimed and protected.

morphemes.gloss: small being of light / spark-light essence

metadata.provenance_note: Grounding-axis parallel to heart (47) and emergence (61)

clusters.name: Qaytra-blapa-torja
clusters.interpretation: Proclaimed living force, open protective flow, affirmed threshold (threshold invocation)
clusters.poetic: Life is proclaimed, protection flows wide, and the gate affirms the self.

morphemes.gloss: proclaimed living force / rooted life called forth
open protective flow / broad guarding breath
affirmed threshold / gate that says yes

metadata.axes: rooted life · open protection · affirmed threshold
metadata.provenance_note: Threshold-axis; extends tor (cluster 55) with ja affirmation

clusters.name: Vi-porka-yala-morkfu
clusters.interpretation: Inner knowing carries power into divine light, where rising blessing grows (knowing-power-light-growth invocation)
clusters.poetic: Inner sight bears the force, divine light receives it, and blessed growth follows.

morphemes.gloss: inner knowing / subtle vision / gentle awareness
carried power / borne force / forward-moving vitality
rising blessed force / growing vital blessing

metadata.axes: inner knowing · carried power · divine light · rising blessing
metadata.provenance_note: Growth-axis culmination; vi particle + por/mor bearing roots

clusters.name: Yafora-mikra-talu
clusters.interpretation: Divine gathering proclaims the small heart in present flow
clusters.poetic: Divine gathering proclaims the small heart in present flow.

clusters.name: Plamu-yafika-torla
clusters.interpretation: Mother-ground opens; divine truth-power enters the lighted gate
clusters.poetic: Mother-ground opens, divine truth-power enters the lighted gate.

clusters.name: Kafro-yami-supla
clusters.interpretation: Power rests; the divine small-being stands on the good open plain
clusters.poetic: Power rests; the divine small-being stands on the good open plain.

clusters.name: Mufra-lakyo-tinara
clusters.interpretation: Mother-breath proclaims light-knowing; the child-name is called forth
clusters.poetic: Mother-breath proclaims light-knowing; the child-name is called forth.

clusters.name: Yorfa-maklu-sipra
clusters.interpretation: Blessed force flows from mother-existence; goodness is proclaimed
clusters.poetic: Blessed force flows from mother-existence; goodness is proclaimed.

clusters.name: Plika-yofra-tamu
clusters.interpretation: Open power meets divine proclamation in the mother-this
clusters.poetic: Open power meets divine proclamation in the mother-this.

clusters.name: Kafya-lorpa-minu
clusters.interpretation: Grace-power protects with light; the small spirit rises
clusters.poetic: Grace-power protects with light; the small spirit rises.

clusters.name: Yupra-makra-silu
clusters.interpretation: The divine proclaims the mother-heart; good light flows
clusters.poetic: The divine proclaims the mother-heart; good light flows.

clusters.name: Torfa-yami-plaku
clusters.interpretation: The gate blesses the divine small-being in the open place of power
clusters.poetic: The gate blesses the divine small-being in the open place of power.

clusters.name: Morka-yaflu-sipta
clusters.interpretation: Rising power flows divinely; goodness is here
clusters.poetic: Rising power flows divinely; goodness is here.

clusters.name: Lakra-yomu-tafra
clusters.interpretation: Light-heart meets divine-mother; this is proclaimed
clusters.poetic: Light-heart meets divine-mother; this is proclaimed.

clusters.name: Plina-yofka-maru
clusters.interpretation: The open name receives divine craft-power; mother rests
clusters.poetic: The open name receives divine craft-power; mother rests.

metadata.feeling: open name · divine craft · mother rest

clusters.name: Kafro-yala-sipro
clusters.interpretation: Power rests in divine light; goodness is carried forward
clusters.poetic: Power rests in divine light; goodness is carried forward.

clusters.name: Mufya-plaro-tikna
clusters.interpretation: Mother-grace rests openly; the child-name emerges
clusters.poetic: Mother-grace rests openly; the child-name emerges.

clusters.name: Yokru-lamfa-sipla
clusters.interpretation: Divine heart-force blesses the mother-light; goodness opens
clusters.poetic: Divine heart-force blesses the mother-light; goodness opens.

metadata.feeling: divine heart-force · mother-light bless · good open

clusters.name: Makyo-yupra-torlu
clusters.interpretation: Mother-knowing is divinely proclaimed; the gate flows
clusters.poetic: Mother-knowing is divinely proclaimed; the gate flows.

clusters.name: Father-kin-child
clusters.interpretation: Father–kin–child: family core (order variant of cluster 12)

morphemes.gloss: sibling / near / kin; also no / not (negation sense)
child / small / sacred diminutive (size; cf. chi=child)

clusters.name: Eye-ear-hand
clusters.interpretation: Eye–ear–hand: full perception triad (order variant of cluster 13)

clusters.name: Fire-water-tree
clusters.interpretation: Fire–water–tree: elemental living triad

clusters.name: Know-bad-rest
clusters.interpretation: Know the heavy/bad; rest in the divine (wisdom through challenge)

morphemes.gloss: bad / heavy / burden; also two / dual

clusters.name: Good-move-divine
clusters.interpretation: The good moves toward the divine (blessed journey)

clusters.name: Head-name-light
clusters.interpretation: Head–name–light: enlightened mind

clusters.name: Heavy-vital-rest
clusters.interpretation: Heavy vital force settles (transforming burden)

morphemes.gloss: bad / heavy / burden; also two / dual

clusters.name: Child-mother-friend
clusters.interpretation: Child–mother–friend: social bond triad

morphemes.gloss: mother / existence / breath-base (formally anchored kinship root)

clusters.name: Speak-give-take
clusters.interpretation: Speak–give–take: communicative exchange

clusters.name: Sun-moon-wind
clusters.interpretation: Sun–moon–wind: sky cycle

clusters.name: Time-change-love
clusters.interpretation: Time–change–love: affective becoming

clusters.name: Inside-outside-near
clusters.interpretation: Inside–outside–near: spatial field

clusters.name: Truth-false-if
clusters.interpretation: Truth–falsehood–condition: logic triad

morphemes.gloss: truth / real (cognitive register; cf. fi sacred-verity)

clusters.name: Heart-bone-blood
clusters.interpretation: Feeling-heart–bone–blood: embodied life

Ye kra ro ya
Lmakra yuckara
Tiki yocfua manalara
Makra yufala
Makora yufina ro
Ebro la kajya lapio mufay
Plafo micala haftar

Yafora mikra talu

Pa ne ti
Fi wa hi
Su bu ya
Du kra ro
Chi ma loi
Sola luna fe
Wi su ni ve ro ya

evidence.gloss: Father–kin–child: family core (order variant of cluster 12)
Eye–ear–hand: full perception triad (order variant of cluster 13)
Fire–water–tree: elemental living triad
Know the heavy/bad; rest in the divine (wisdom through challenge)
The good moves toward the divine (blessed journey)
Head–name–light: enlightened mind
Heavy vital force settles (transforming burden)
Child–mother–friend: social bond triad
Speak–give–take: communicative exchange
Sun–moon–wind: sky cycle
Time–change–love: affective becoming
Inside–outside–near: spatial field
Truth–falsehood–condition: logic triad
Feeling-heart–bone–blood: embodied life
